sources.limitations: Synthetic benchmark travel-history source. Supports closed-world absence only for US entry/exit events recorded by CBP within its coverage window; does not support absence of exception approvals, employment status, or purpose of travel.
sources.title: CBP travel-history printout

sources.limitations: Shows no exception document included in the submitted packet. Supports closed-world absence only for documents submitted in this packet (e.g., N-470 approval, qualifying employment-abroad approval, military service exception, religious-vocation exception). Does not establish whether such approvals exist outside the packet, nor does it support facts about the trip's purpose or the applicant's circumstances.
sources.title: Case packet index
